/usr/bin/clang -fPIC -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/combined.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libcombined.so -o libcombined.so CMakeFiles/combined.dir/combined_core.c.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/libcrux_ct_ops.c.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/libcrux_mldsa44_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/libcrux_mldsa65_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/libcrux_mldsa87_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/libcrux_mldsa_core.c.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/libcrux_mldsa_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/libcrux_mlkem768_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/libcrux_mlkem_core.c.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/libcrux_sha3_portable.c.o
